data.title: GreatFence.com completes ecommerce website redesign
data.description: The new site supports secure checkout with financing options, a nod to the growing demand for flexible payment methods in home improvement purchases.

data.title: Amazon signals major shifts for B2B ecommerce
data.description: What Amazon is signaling — both through its investments and its culture — is a belief that B2B buying should be just as simple, fast, and intelligent as consumer shopping.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Tariffs challenge a recovery for online consumer electronics sales
data.description: New U.S.- and China-imposed tariffs stand to increase costs and drive up prices in Consumer Electronics, particularly for online sales leaders such as Apple and Best Buy.

data.title: Walmart+ Week closely follows Amazon Big Spring Sale
data.description: Walmart+ Week is the retailer's annual members-only sales event. Last year, it also held Walmart Deals just days later, which was not exclusive to members.

data.title: Human Element and Znode team up to expand B2B ecommerce
data.description: The collaboration merges Human Element’s two decades of ecommerce consulting and development experience with Znode’s API-first, headless platform designed specifically for B2B transactions.
